microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across strategic enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0-to-1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, production-ready model serving cross-org stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the enterprise customer base.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test directly tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, aligning internal and customer stakeholders across complex, high-stakes scenarios.

Shaped the product roadmap by distilling customer insights from 20+ enterprise engagements into structured requirements, directly influencing future platform features and cluster design priorities across engineering and ML teams.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, accelerating the end-to-end customer delivery cycle.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure, conducting customer-facing demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly on developer-facing tooling.

Influenced the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer requirements into structured feedback for the engineering team.

Optimized data retrieval for developer users by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving LLM-powered tool accuracy across the platform.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, co-architecting the GTM strategy across 140+ internal service teams.

Drove product discovery across 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a structured roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing engineering investment decisions and reducing time-to-production for enterprise customers.

Enabled leadership to target **high-impact automation gaps** by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, turning unstructured process data into a prioritized, decision-ready view for senior stakeholders.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a production-ready deployment plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and accelerate feature delivery for a customer-facing robotics platform.

Drove **cross-functional alignment** across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, cutting the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable, repeatable release model for future fleet-wide rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end customer journey — redesigning the scoping, proposal, and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly engagements via a new CRM workflow that improved conversion and reduced sales cycle friction.

Executed a **digital-first go-to-market strategy** targeting customer acquisition, optimizing the website and Google profile to reduce CAC by 13% and lift conversions by 2.7%, demonstrating early ownership of GTM strategy and growth levers.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that informed a revised pricing model adopted across the business.
